response.text:

rationale: r1c1's SoC (35%) remains below your minimum reserve threshold (60%), and your declining SoC requires conservative preservation; normal urgency does not override survival constraints.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: r1c0 is over-committed to peer requests and SoC is declining rapidly. Adopting conservative sharing with high minimum reserve (60%) to ensure survival. Geographic round-robin remains fallback, but max share rate capped to 0.1 kW/tick to prevent depletion. Peers r0c0, r1c1, r2c0 show chronic deficits; prioritize only urgent requests..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
